description: Standardize features robust to outliers by removing the median and scaling by the IQR.

interface.input_shapes: X_train: pd.DataFrame, X_test: pd.DataFrame, columns: list

known_pitfalls: Columns with zero variance or all identical values will output NaN values during scale division.
